title: 弱点！？キミに教えてもらったコト

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Good morning! The flowers you had on display were wilted, so I
replaced them with new ones!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Oh, and that there on your desk is a lucky handkerchief my dad
makes. It's good feng shui and made of really soft material, so you
should have it! What else...

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
The windows are closed, so open them up! Air circulation is the basis
of feng shui, you know? And now your day's set to be super lucky! ☆
Well, see you at training!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Thanks to her adjustments to the office, I start to find myself in a
good mood more often, and my work is going swimmingly. But I can't
help thinking...
choice_data_list: (She's done more for me than I have for her.)

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As her trainer, it's supposed to be my job to support her. I wonder
what I can do to repay her...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Some time later...

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Huh? Oh, it's you, Trainer! What a coincidence! ...Right, do you have
some time now? There's somewhere I'd like to show you!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: It's sudden, but I'm not actually in a rush, so I go with her.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
So here we are, the zoo! Hehe, outings like this are great for getting
your qi flowing, so it might just bring you some luck!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
The key is to go in your auspicious direction! And this zoo just so
happens to be in that direction, so I've been meaning to bring you
here for a... while...

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: ...Is someone crying? Sorry, I have to check if something happened!

text_block_list.name: Timid Girl
text_block_list.text: Where did... everyone go? Sniffle...

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: Are you okay? What are you doing out here all alone?

text_block_list.name: Timid Girl
text_block_list.text: I... I... Waaah! I dunno where they went!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Okay, so she got separated from her family... Figures, with the
landform around here being this damp and all.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
For now, let me take you to the lost kids center! It's a nice place filled
with fun things to do!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: The moment Copano Rickey grabs the girl's hand...
Oh, there you are!

text_block_list.name: Older Sister
text_block_list.text:
I'm sorry, I shouldn't have let go of your hand! Mom and Dad are
looking for you, so let's hurry back!
Um... thank you!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
No problem, I just stayed with her, that's all. I'm glad you found each
other! Take care!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Oh yeah! On your way back, go down the big path in the middle! It's
the most auspicious path, so it's also the safest!

text_block_list.name: Older Sister
text_block_list.text: Auspicious path? Um... are you into, like... occult stuff?

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
No, it's nothing to do with the occult, but I suppose it does often get
mistaken for it. Why do you ask?

text_block_list.name: Older Sister
text_block_list.text:
Well, at school, they told us not to go with people who say suspicious
things, because you could get kidnapped! So... Oh!

text_block_list.name: Older Sister
text_block_list.text: D-didn't you just say you would take my sister somewhere nice?!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Oh, that? What I meant is, the landform around here is making the qi
stagnant. Doesn't the humidity make you feel a bit sluggish?

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
That means you have to be careful of the stagnant qi on the borders
of the eight trigrams, so I thought she should be somewhere more
lucky...

text_block_list.name: Older Sister
text_block_list.text:
Stagnant qi? Trigrams? I don't know those words. Oh, you must be...
Mooommyyy!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I calm down the children and explain that Copano Rickey is a student
at the academy who wanted to take the girl to the lost kids center.
She's not anyone suspicious.

text_block_list.name: Older Sister
text_block_list.text: S-s-s-sorry! I'm sorry! I was just so scared, and I... I... Forgive me!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It worked out in the end, but I'm worried that the incident just now
put a damper on her mood...

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Ahhh, I messed that up! Thank you for working things out! I guess
feng shui must sound kind of scary to children.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
I probably should have waited for the little girl to calm down before I
started explaining things. People always tell me that I come on too
strong. Well, lesson learned!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Or maybe she's fine? She's talking normally, and she's already
reflected on what went wrong and how to fix it. But the tension
showing on her face tells a different story.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
What? Yep, never better! I'll take care not to make the same mistake
again, and I definitely won't let it get to me!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Copano Rickey is good at lifting the mood with feng shui. Her ability
to avoid disturbing her qi by planning for the future and working
toward those plans is her strength.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
That's why she's desperately attempting to put a lid on her negative
emotions right now and ignore them altogether. I tell her that I've
noticed.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: ...Huh?

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Oh... Yeah. Maybe you're right. You know, my dad told me something
similar once.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
He said I try too hard to solve everything with feng shui, and I tend to
avoid facing my feelings... especially when I feel weak.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Feng shui works subconsciously, so you shouldn't put a lid on it. I
thought I knew that, but... heh, looks like I messed up again.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
So, um... what now? How am I supposed to solve my problems without
feng shui?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She puzzles over the question. My guess is that she needs to start by
simply acknowledging her emotions.
choice_data_list:
Back at the zoo, how did you feel in the
moment?

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Huh? How'd I feel? Well, let's see... When the girl screamed, I felt a
tightness in my chest and my mind went blank...
choice_data_list: Were you sad that you got misunderstood?

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Sad? Oh, I think that's it! But I get misunderstood all the time, so that
part wasn't a surprise.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: It's just... I know I can do better than that...
choice_data_list:
So you were disappointed that you couldn't get
your point across?

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Y-yeah! I don't usually make people scream! I know I can tell people
how to improve their luck more effectively!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: ...So, yeah. That's what I was thinking.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
When she looks at me, I notice her face has relaxed and she's got her
usual cheerful expression back.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Whew, I'm feeling better already! It's like a weight's been lifted off
my chest! ...Guess I really was ignoring my feelings.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: Thanks for the talk. ...You're the best, Trainer!
